section2IntroPhysical: Give these credentials to your POS vendor to automate sending.
section2IntroEcommerce: Share this link with your integrator or automation tool (Zapier, Make, etc.) to trigger after delivery.
webhookRotateWarning: Rotating the key revokes the old URL — update your POS / Zapier immediately.
noApiKey: No API key generated for this account.
rotateKeyTitle: Generate a new key (revokes the previous URL immediately)
zapierHint: Your till does not support direct webhooks?
posterTip: Tip: A4 at the counter; A5 if space is tight; A3 for a wall poster. Print at 100%, without “Fit to page”.
ecommerceCheckoutNote: For online stores, actually inserting the clause (section 1) and applying it in your checkout is your responsibility. Without this on your site, REPUTEXA cannot be held liable for shortcomings in information or consent collection.
payloadNoAuthNote: No authentication header required — the key is in the URL.
ecomCardIdentityBody: first_name and phone — required for WhatsApp.
ecomCardComplianceBody: whatsapp_consent must be true to allow sending.
ecomCardLogisticsBody: status triggers sending once the parcel is marked delivered (e.g. Delivered, Livré, Zugestellt…) — tracking_number optional.
webhookPhysicalPayloadExplainer: For physical retail, this JSON body replaces client-side entry on the terminal: the till sends first name, phone and optionally the purchase label to personalize the WhatsApp invite.
